name: bug-fix
description: General bug investigation -> RCA -> fix -> verify, from ANY source (QA/lead/user/log/build/review/E2E). intake -> reproduce -> RCA(mh-rca) -> fix-plan -> optional review gate -> fix(/mh-fix) -> verify, over envelopes + a state machine. robust-test may route confirmed E2E bugs here after owner approval.
required_inputs: bug report, finding path, or failing validation artifact
target worktree before any source edit
